summary: Travel page improvements testing completed. All 7 features verified working: Plan My Trip button opens wizard with 4 travel types, Shop Travel Kits scrolls to bundles section, Travel Concierge Experience cards have staggered animations (0ms, 100ms, 200ms, 300ms delays), hero text is clean without ghost effect, mobile responsive at 390x844, wizard allows selecting travel type and opens form steps, POST /api/travel/request creates service desk ticket with unified flow (ticket_id, notification_id, inbox_id).

plan_my_trip_button.details: Button opens travel wizard modal with 4 travel type options (cab, train, flight, relocation)

shop_travel_kits_button.details: Button scrolls to #travel-kits section showing bundles (Cab Travel Kit, Train Travel Kit, Flight Ready Kit, Relocation Comfort Pack)

staggered_animations.details: Travel Concierge Experience cards have animate-fade-in-up class with staggered delays

hero_text_clean.details: Hero text 'Adventures Begin Together' displays cleanly without ghost text effect

verified: Hero section visible with CTA buttons
Travel Concierge Experience cards in 2x2 grid (grid-cols-2)

steps: Step 3: Enter journey details (cities, date, time, contact info)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Travel page improvements verified: Plan My Trip opens wizard with 4 travel types, Shop Travel Kits scrolls to bundles, staggered animations on experience cards (0-300ms delays), clean hero text, mobile responsive 2x2 grid, wizard flow works for non-logged-in users, POST /api/travel/request creates unified flow tickets. All backend tests pass.
